texto: Is the purpose of theoretical physics to be no more than a cataloging of all the things that can happen when particles interact with each other and separate? Or is it to be an understanding at a deeper level in which there are things that are not directly observable (as the underlying quantized fields are) but in terms of which we shall have a more fundamental understanding?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Julian Schwinger que provoca temas ligados a saude mental. Ao questionar “Is the purpose of theoretical physics to be no more than a cataloging of all the things that can …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre saude-mental, fundamentals, nobel-laureate, com foco em nobel-laureate e particle-physics.
